allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "cd C:\\Users\\Student\\MilanSQL\\milansql\\build && \(echo CREATE TABLE mitarbeiter \(id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name TEXT, abteilung TEXT, gehalt INT\) && echo INSERT INTO mitarbeiter VALUES \(NULL, Anna, IT, 5000\) && echo INSERT INTO mitarbeiter VALUES \(NULL, Bob, HR, 3500\) && echo INSERT INTO mitarbeiter VALUES \(NULL, Clara, IT, 4200\) && echo INSERT INTO mitarbeiter VALUES \(NULL, Diana, HR, 4800\) && echo WITH temp AS \(SELECT * FROM mitarbeiter WHERE abteilung = IT\) && echo SELECT * FROM temp WHERE gehalt ^> 4000 && echo exit\) | milansql.exe")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x\) for x in d.get\('permissions',{}\).get\('allow',[]\)]")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/query -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"sql": "CREATE TABLE users \(id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name TEXT\)"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/query -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"sql": "INSERT INTO users VALUES \(NULL, Alice\)"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/query -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"sql": "INSERT INTO users VALUES \(NULL, Bob\)"}')

Bash(printf "CREATE TABLE termine \(id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, titel TEXT, termin_datum DATE, erstellt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\);\\nINSERT INTO termine \(titel, termin_datum\) VALUES \('Meeting', '2026-06-15'\);\\nINSERT INTO termine \(titel, termin_datum\) VALUES \('Urlaub', '2026-08-01'\);\\nSELECT * FROM termine;\\nSELECT NOW\(\);\\nSELECT CURDATE\(\) AS heute;\\nSELECT YEAR\('2023-08-25'\) AS jahr, MONTH\('2023-08-25'\) AS monat, DAY\('2023-08-25'\) AS tag;\\nSELECT DATEDIFF\('2024-01-01', '2023-01-01'\) AS jahrestage;\\nSELECT DATE_ADD\('2026-06-01', INTERVAL 30 DAY\) AS plus30;\\nSELECT DATE_FORMAT\('2026-05-28 14:30:00', '%%d.%%m.%%Y %%H:%%i'\) AS formatiert;\\nSELECT id, titel, DATE\(erstellt\) AS datum FROM termine;\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_dates;\\nCREATE TABLE test_dates \(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, birthday DATE\);\\nINSERT INTO test_dates \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(1, 'Alice', '1990-05-15'\);\\nINSERT INTO test_dates \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(2, 'Bob', '1985-12-03'\);\\nSELECT * FROM test_dates;\\nSELECT NOW\(\);\\nSELECT CURDATE\(\) AS heute;\\nSELECT CURTIME\(\) AS uhrzeit;\\nSELECT YEAR\('2023-08-25'\) AS jahr, MONTH\('2023-08-25'\) AS monat, DAY\('2023-08-25'\) AS tag;\\nSELECT DATEDIFF\('2024-01-01', '2023-01-01'\) AS jahrestage;\\nSELECT DATE_ADD\('2026-06-01', INTERVAL 30 DAY\) AS plus30;\\nSELECT DATE_FORMAT\('2026-05-28 14:30:00', '%%d.%%m.%%Y'\) AS formatiert;\\nSELECT id, name, YEAR\(birthday\) AS geburtsjahr FROM test_dates;\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf "CREATE TABLE users \(id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, email TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, birthday DATE\);\\nINSERT INTO users \(id, name, email, birthday\) VALUES \(1, 'Alice', 'alice@example.com', '1990-05-15'\);\\nINSERT INTO users \(id, name, email, birthday\) VALUES \(2, 'Bob', 'bob@example.com', '1985-12-03'\);\\nSELECT * FROM users;\\nSELECT id, name, YEAR\(birthday\) AS geburtsjahr, MONTH\(birthday\) AS monat FROM users;\\nSELECT DATEDIFF\(CURDATE\(\), birthday\) AS tage_seit_geburt FROM users;\\nSELECT NOW\(\) AS jetzt, CURDATE\(\) AS heute, CURTIME\(\) AS uhrzeit;\\nSELECT YEAR\('2023-08-25'\) AS j, MONTH\('2023-08-25'\) AS m, DAY\('2023-08-25'\) AS d;\\nSELECT DATE_ADD\('2026-06-01', INTERVAL 30 DAY\) AS plus30;\\nSELECT DATE_ADD\('2026-06-01', INTERVAL 2 MONTH\) AS plus2mon;\\nSELECT DATE_SUB\('2026-06-01', INTERVAL 1 YEAR\) AS minus1j;\\nSELECT DATE_FORMAT\('2026-05-28 14:30:00', '%%d. %%b %%Y'\) AS formatiert;\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf "CREATE TABLE dt_test \(id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, birthday DATE\);\\nINSERT INTO dt_test \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(1, 'Alice', '1990-05-15'\);\\nINSERT INTO dt_test \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(2, 'Bob', '1985-12-03'\);\\nSELECT * FROM dt_test;\\nSELECT id, name, YEAR\(birthday\) AS geburtsjahr FROM dt_test;\\nSELECT id, name, DATEDIFF\(CURDATE\(\), birthday\) AS alter_tage FROM dt_test;\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf "CREATE TABLE dt2 \(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, birthday DATE\);\\nINSERT INTO dt2 \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(1, 'Alice', '1990-05-15'\);\\nINSERT INTO dt2 \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(2, 'Bob', '1985-12-03'\);\\nSELECT * FROM dt2;\\nSELECT id, name, YEAR\(birthday\) AS geburtsjahr, DATEDIFF\(CURDATE\(\), birthday\) AS alter_tage FROM dt2;\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf "CREATE TABLE dt3 \(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, birthday DATE\);\\nINSERT INTO dt3 \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(1, 'Alice', '1990-05-15'\);\\nINSERT INTO dt3 \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(2, 'Bob', '1985-12-03'\);\\nSELECT * FROM dt3;\\nSELECT id, name, YEAR\(birthday\) AS geburtsjahr FROM dt3;\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf "CREATE TABLE dt_phase55 \(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, birthday DATE\);\\nINSERT INTO dt_phase55 \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(1, 'Alice', '1990-05-15'\);\\nINSERT INTO dt_phase55 \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(2, 'Bob', '1985-12-03'\);\\nSELECT * FROM dt_phase55;\\nSELECT id, name, YEAR\(birthday\) AS geburtsjahr FROM dt_phase55;\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf "CREATE TABLE p55 \(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, birthday DATE\);\\nINSERT INTO p55 \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(1, 'Alice', '1990-05-15'\);\\nINSERT INTO p55 \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(2, 'Bob', '1985-12-03'\);\\nSELECT * FROM p55;\\nSELECT id, name, YEAR\(birthday\) AS geburtsjahr, DATEDIFF\(CURDATE\(\), birthday\) AS alter_tage FROM p55;\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf "CREATE TABLE p55b \(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, birthday DATE\);\\nINSERT INTO p55b \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(1, 'Alice', '1990-05-15'\);\\nINSERT INTO p55b \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(2, 'Bob', '1985-12-03'\);\\nSELECT * FROM p55b;\\nSELECT id, name, YEAR\(birthday\) AS geburtsjahr, DATEDIFF\(CURDATE\(\), birthday\) AS alter_tage FROM p55b;\\nSELECT id, name, DATE_FORMAT\(birthday, '%%d.%%m.%%Y'\) AS geb_formatiert FROM p55b;\\nSELECT DATE_ADD\(birthday, INTERVAL 30 DAY\) AS plus30 FROM p55b;\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf "CREATE TABLE p55c \(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, birthday DATE\);\\nINSERT INTO p55c \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(1, 'Alice', '1990-05-15'\);\\nINSERT INTO p55c \(id, name, birthday\) VALUES \(2, 'Bob', '1985-12-03'\);\\nSELECT * FROM p55c;\\nSELECT id, name, YEAR\(birthday\) AS geburtsjahr, DATEDIFF\(CURDATE\(\), birthday\) AS alter_tage FROM p55c;\\nSELECT id, name, DATE_FORMAT\(birthday, '%%d.%%m.%%Y'\) AS geb_formatiert FROM p55c;\\nSELECT id, DATE_ADD\(birthday, INTERVAL 1 YEAR\) AS naechstes_geb FROM p55c;\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf 'CREATE TABLE produkte \(id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name TEXT, specs JSON, tags JSON\);\\nINSERT INTO produkte VALUES \(NULL, Laptop, {"cpu":"Intel i7","ram":16,"ssd":512,"preis":1299.99}, ["elektronik","computer","premium"]\);\\nINSERT INTO produkte VALUES \(NULL, Maus, {"tasten":3,"kabellos":true,"farbe":"schwarz"}, ["elektronik","zubehoer"]\);\\nINSERT INTO produkte VALUES \(NULL, Monitor, {"zoll":27,"aufloesung":"4K","hdr":true}, ["elektronik","display"]\);\\nSELECT * FROM produkte;\\nEXIT\\n')

Bash(printf 'SELECT name, JSON_EXTRACT\(specs, '"'"'$.cpu'"'"'\) AS cpu FROM produkte WHERE JSON_EXTRACT\(specs, '"'"'$.cpu'"'"'\) != '"'"''"'"';\\nSELECT name, JSON_LENGTH\(specs\) AS felder FROM produkte ORDER BY felder DESC;\\nSELECT name, JSON_EXTRACT\(tags, '"'"'$[0]'"'"'\) AS hauptkategorie FROM produkte;\\nSELECT name FROM produkte WHERE JSON_CONTAINS\(specs, '"'"'true'"'"', '"'"'$.kabellos'"'"'\);\\nSELECT name, JSON_TYPE\(specs\) AS typ, JSON_KEYS\(specs\) AS keys FROM produkte;\\nEXIT\\n')

Bash(printf "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS p56test;\\nCREATE TABLE p56test \(id INT, name TEXT, data JSON\);\\nINSERT INTO p56test VALUES \(1, Valid, {\\"key\\":\\"value\\"}\);\\nINSERT INTO p56test VALUES \(2, Invalid, not-json-at-all\);\\nSELECT * FROM p56test;\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf "DROP TABLE bestellungen\\nDROP TABLE kunden\\nSHOW TABLES\\nRESTORE DATABASE FROM 'test_backup.sql'\\nSHOW TABLES\\nSELECT * FROM kunden\\nSELECT * FROM bestellungen\\nSELECT * FROM grosse_bestellungen\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf "DROP TABLE bestellungen\\nDROP TABLE kunden\\nRESTORE DATABASE FROM 'test_backup.sql'\\nSELECT * FROM kunden\\nSELECT * FROM bestellungen\\nSELECT * FROM grosse_bestellungen\\nBACKUP TABLE kunden TO 'kunden_backup.sql'\\nSHOW BACKUPS\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf "CREATE TABLE bench \(id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, wert INT, name TEXT\)\\nINSERT INTO bench VALUES \(NULL, 42, Alice\)\\nINSERT INTO bench VALUES \(NULL, 99, Bob\)\\nCREATE INDEX idx_wert ON bench \(wert\)\\nBENCHMARK 500 SELECT * FROM bench WHERE id = 1\\nBENCHMARK 100 SELECT * FROM bench WHERE wert = 42\\nSHOW STATUS\\nEXIT\\n")
Bash(printf "BENCHMARK 500 SELECT * FROM bench WHERE id = 1\\nBENCHMARK 100 SELECT * FROM bench WHERE wert = 42\\nSHOW STATUS\\nEXIT\\n")
Bash(printf "BENCHMARK 500 SELECT * FROM bench WHERE id = 1\\nSHOW STATUS\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf "CREATE TABLE counter \(id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, wert INT, ts DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\)\\nINSERT INTO counter VALUES \(NULL, 0, NULL\)\\nCREATE EVENT increment_counter ON SCHEDULE EVERY 2 SECOND DO INSERT INTO counter VALUES \(NULL, 1, NULL\)\\n")
Bash(sed -i 's/MilanSQL v1\\.3\\.0/MilanSQL v1.4.0/g' src/main.cpp src/dispatch.hpp src/server/http_server.hpp)

Bash(printf 'CREATE TABLE bestellungen \(id INT, user_id VARCHAR, produkt VARCHAR\);\\nINSERT INTO bestellungen VALUES \(1, '"'"'alice'"'"', '"'"'Buch'"'"'\);\\nINSERT INTO bestellungen VALUES \(2, '"'"'bob'"'"', '"'"'Stift'"'"'\);\\nINSERT INTO bestellungen VALUES \(3, '"'"'alice'"'"', '"'"'Heft'"'"'\);\\nALTER TABLE bestellungen ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;\\nCREATE POLICY alice_policy ON bestellungen FOR SELECT TO alice USING \(user_id = CURRENT_USER_ID\(\)\);\\nCREATE POLICY bob_policy ON bestellungen FOR SELECT TO bob USING \(user_id = CURRENT_USER_ID\(\)\);\\nSHOW POLICIES ON bestellungen;\\nCONNECT USER alice PASSWORD '"'"''"'"';\\nSELECT * FROM bestellungen;\\nCONNECT USER root PASSWORD '"'"''"'"';\\nSELECT * FROM bestellungen;\\nEXIT\\n')

Bash(printf "CREATE TABLE fahrzeug \(id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name TEXT, ps INT\)\\nCREATE TABLE auto \(tueren INT\) INHERITS \(fahrzeug\)\\nCREATE TABLE motorrad \(seitenkoffer INT\) INHERITS \(fahrzeug\)\\nINSERT INTO fahrzeug VALUES \(NULL, Traktor, 80\)\\nINSERT INTO auto VALUES \(NULL, BMW, 200, 4\)\\nINSERT INTO auto VALUES \(NULL, VW, 150, 5\)\\nINSERT INTO motorrad VALUES \(NULL, Honda, 100, 0\)\\nINSERT INTO motorrad VALUES \(NULL, Ducati, 180, 1\)\\nSELECT * FROM fahrzeug\\nSELECT * FROM ONLY fahrzeug\\nSELECT * FROM auto\\nSELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM fahrzeug\\nSHOW INHERITANCE\\nCREATE TABLE luxusauto \(leder INT\) INHERITS \(auto\)\\nINSERT INTO luxusauto VALUES \(NULL, Porsche, 400, 2, 1\)\\nSELECT * FROM fahrzeug\\nEXIT\\n")

Bash(printf "CREATE COLUMN TABLE sales \(id INT, region TEXT, umsatz REAL, menge INT\)\\nINSERT INTO sales VALUES \(1, Nord, 1200.50, 5\)\\nINSERT INTO sales VALUES \(2, Sued, 800.00, 3\)\\nINSERT INTO sales VALUES \(3, Nord, 2100.00, 8\)\\nINSERT INTO sales VALUES \(4, Ost, 650.75, 2\)\\nINSERT INTO sales VALUES \(5, Nord, 900.25, 4\)\\nSELECT SUM\(umsatz\) FROM sales\\nSELECT AVG\(umsatz\) FROM sales\\nSELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM sales\\nSELECT * FROM sales WHERE umsatz > 1000\\nSHOW STORAGE FORMAT\\nEXIT\\n")
